patch.value: Audit GitHub issues, PRs, checks, dependency/security reports, full history, package contents, and real multi-repo behavior. Preserve unrelated work. Generate CHANGELOG.md and release notes with pm-changelog. Verify daily change-gated GitHub/npm/Bun release automation. Run Greptile before push, then bot review loops to green.
Production hardening and fleet-operations safety pass 2026-07-09

Deep-test pm-ops against production-like multi-repo fleets; reconcile PRs #5/#6; harden failure isolation, output, policy, release, and activation behavior; align current pm CLI/SDK and changelog tooling.

Every command and SDK capability is exercised against real or production-like repositories; partial failures are safe and actionable; tests/build/typecheck/audit/pack/install/activation/release dry-run pass; privacy/history audit is clean; PRs #5/#6 have an explicit safe resolution; release automation uses current toolchain and pm-changelog.
Existing PR branches, repo state, gh authentication, pm CLI 2026.7.9, npm metadata, and canonical checkout are available.

value.author: codex-foundation
value.text: Specialized agent started scoped production audit on 2026-07-09; pm-cli source and telemetry/observability configuration are out of scope.

value.author: codex-foundation
value.text: Evidence will include exact commands, linked files/docs/tests, GitHub review disposition, package tarball verification, real workspace fixtures, and path-only sensitive-data scan summaries.

author: codex-foundation
message: Specialized foundation agent resumes production hardening

value.text: Toolchain baseline is global pm CLI 2026.7.9. Required package target is @unbrained/pm-cli 2026.7.9 and pm-changelog 2026.7.8 after registry verification. No telemetry/observability changes are authorized.
